title: 🧿 Hyperbolic Tiling
name: Hyperbolic Tiling
what_it_is: Tiling that happens in curved space—like Escher’s famous fish patterns that shrink infinitely toward the edges.
how_to_use: her cloak ripples with hyperbolic tiling—endless recursive figures shrinking into curvature
temple floors bend in hyperbolic symmetry—non-Euclidean mosaics wrapping inwards
animation_behavior: Tiling flows inward forever, curvature increases, perspective warps as you move ---
